## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / formatting fix (no review needed beyond CI)
- [ ] Clarification to existing content

- [ ] New feature / artifact type

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [contribution guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If this touches `docs/documentation-approach.md`, I've checked that all cross-references and worked examples remain consistent
- [ ] If this adds a new example, all artifact files are internally consistent (IDs match, cross-references work, `triggered_by` fields are populated)
